title: Troppo per vivere... poco per morire
writer: Sandro Continenza, Ernesto Gastaldi, Paolo Levi
actors: Claudio Brook, Daniela Bianchi, Sydney Chaplin
plot: When Gordon Smash tries to get away with the loot from a successful diamond heist, his fellow conspirators shoot him in the back. Smash manages to get a clue to newspaper reporter Robert Foster, who sets of to retrieve the diamond...
